column1: # Cytochrome c — the classic molecular-clock protein, here across the breadth of
# This ~105-residue electron carrier is alignable from mammals through reptiles,
# fish and insects to fungi and plants, so the inferred tree spans well over a
# billion years of evolution in a single short alignment — a deliberately
# different scale from the within-family examples. (No relativeTo here: the
# point is the breadth of the tree, not a reference diff.)
